concerns.text: FR-002 validates 'fixation duration, saccade amplitude, recall accuracy, valence label' but the idea explicitly requires three attention measures: 'fixation duration, saccade patterns, and gaze distribution'. Gaze distribution is not explicitly validated or computed in FR-003. This is under-reach on a core predictor variable named in the idea.

FR-004 assumes three valence categories (positive, negative, neutral) without explicit grounding in the idea. The idea mentions 'emotionally valenced narrative content' but does not specify the number or names of valence categories. This assumption should be documented or validated against available datasets.
